mapper.select: select * from jst_appointment_writeoff_item where writeoff_item_id = #{writeoffItemId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select wi.writeoff_item_id as writeoffItemId, wi.appointment_id as appointmentId, wi.team_appointment_id as teamAppointmentId, wi.item_type as itemType, wi.item_name as itemName, wi.qr_code as qrCode, wi.status as status, wi.writeoff_qty as writeoffQty, wi.total_qty as totalQty, ar.participant_id as participantId, ar.main_status as appointmentStatus, ar.session_code as sessionCode, ar.appointment_date as appointmentDate, p.name as memberName, t.team_name as teamName, t.total_persons as teamTotalPersons, t.writeoff_persons as teamWriteoffPersons, t.status as teamStatus, c.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, c.partner_id as partnerId from jst_appointment_writeoff_item wi left join jst_appointment_record ar on ar.appointment_id = wi.appointment_id and ar.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = ar.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_team_appointment t on t.team_appointment_id = wi.team_appointment_id and t.del_flag = '0' left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = ar.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where wi.qr_code = #{qrCode} and wi.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update jst_appointment_writeoff_item set status = 'voided', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and status = 'unused' and del_flag = '0'
update jst_appointment_writeoff_item set status = 'expired', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and status = 'unused' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select writeoff_item_id as writeoffItemId, item_type as itemType, item_name as itemName, qr_code as qrCode, status as status, writeoff_time as writeoffTime from jst_appointment_writeoff_item where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and del_flag = '0' order by writeoff_item_id asc
